texts.full_text: been used for fluorescent lighting since World War II because they emit bright light when bombarded with electrons, but the use of thoria has declined its radioactivity and toxicity concerns. Thorium is an important source in nuclear reactors; it can be burned as a fuel to produce heat through fission reactions. Thorite (thorium(III) oxide), monazite sand or scheelites are primary sources for extracting the element from nature, usually by mining them and then processing. Thoriated metal is produced commercially in small quantities using electrolysis of molten chloride salts containing thoria; this method was developed during World War II to help produce fissile uranium-233 through neutron capture reactions. ThorIum has been used for a variety purposes, including its use as an additive or dopant material that can increase the beta radiation sensitivity and luminous efficacy of certain types. thoriated zinc sulfide is commonly employed in some fluorescent lamps to boost efficiency; thoria-doped baria strontia tItanate (BST) ceramics are used for capacitors, while small amounts added into zirconium dioxide improve its ferroelectric properties. Thorite and monazites contain other radioactive elements such as

texts.full_text: within ROLZO’s membership app, making it a lot easier, and far less long-winded, to simply acquire whichever car you need, for a few days, at the click of a button. Additionally, if you fancy travelling in style, but aren’t in the mood to drive yourself, ROLZO also provides a chauffeuring service within its membership package. ROLZO offers a whole new level of luxury Speaking about the launch of the London-based company, which is already generating serious traction in the luxury vehicle sector, Chief Executive Officer Tom Ripert said, “The lifestyle markers of car ownership that have been held dear in past years are now seen as irrelevant by a society that is rapidly evolving from ownership to usership. Rather, it’s now more important to have access to a car as opposed to owning one.” It is a fair point. For most, owning a lavish car is all about experiencing the feeling of driving it, and being noticed stepping in and out of it. What good is a vehicle if it’s stored in your garage during office hours, and only getting some fresh air on rare days off? Ripert believes that ROLZO presents members with the status and kudos of driving a luxury vehicle, without any of the tedium associated with maintenance. Hire a car that is unique and exclusively yours – whether your main focus is performance, aesthetics or a captivating presence “Our members want quick access to mobility. They want to press a button on their phone and have a car be ready when they arrive or have a car show up at their location when they need it.” “We’re simplifying the archaic process traditionally associated with hiring a car by combining state-of-the-art technologies and hyper-personal service. Our members can simply connect

texts.full_text: the Crane lake part two A topnotch WordPress.com site About me. Do they ever predict the weather right? They promised or perhaps threatened us with heavy rain showers all day today but so far we’ve only gotten some drizzling. But the day is still young so it may just be delayed. I don’t mind the rain because I can see how nature loves it but I wouldn’t mind if they are wrong in their predictions, they usually are when it comes to beautiful weather so why not now 🙂 It’s around 10C (50F ) outside but I have the kitchen door open at the same time as I have a fire burning in the stove 🙂 I’ve done the laundry and would have moved the lawn now but the grass is too wet so that’ll have to wait. I’m a bit tired today because I watched the Eurovision Song Contest Final yesterday. I don't mind the rain because I can see how nature loves it but I wouldn't mind if they are wrong in their predictions, they usually are when it comes to beautiful weather so why not now It's around 10C (50F) outside but i have the kitchen door open at the same time as I have a fire burning in the stove I've done the laundry and would have moved the lawn now but the grass is too wet so that'll have to wait. I'm a bit tired today because I watched the Eurovision

texts.preview_tail: l/basilar system disruptions may impair the brainstem, cerebellum, or posterior cerebral regions, often causing balance issues, visual disturbances, or consciousness changes. This anatomical framework
texts.full_text: ebral/basilar system supplies the brainstem and cerebellum and the posterior one-third of the cerebral hemispheres (via the posterior cerebral arteries). These systems collectively form the cerebral circulation, which is interconnected by the Circle of Willis, a ring-like arterial network at the base of the brain. This network allows for collateral blood flow between the carotid and vertebral systems, providing redundancy in case of partial blockage or reduced flow in one artery. Clinical Relevance: Understanding these arterial territories is critical in diagnosing and treating cerebral artery diseases, such as stroke or aneurysms. For example, occlusion of the internal carotid artery typically affects the anterior and middle cerebral artery territories, leading to symptoms in the front and sides of the brain, while vertebral/basilar system disruptions may impair the brainstem, cerebellum, or posterior cerebral regions, often causing balance issues, visual disturbances, or consciousness changes. This anatomical framework

texts.full_text: 13 songs in a row. These were available exclusively via cell phone downloads, each for 100 yen. Each song was released on the 7th, 17th, or 27th of each month until August 27, 2006. of the songs were covers of 1980s hit songs, but a few tracks were new. On June 6th American anime convention Otakon announced that Kitade would be a musical guest for Otakon 2006 in August. 18: Eighteen was released in the United States through Tofu Records on July 11, 2006. On July 12th Kitade released her second EP, Cutie Bunny, which contained six of the released cell phone songs. On August 2, she made an in-store performance at San Francisco's Virgin Megastore and gave her US radio interview with EigoMANGA's radio program, Shibuya Airwaves. Then, on August 4, she made her first East Coast performance at the Ram's Head Live at Otakon. On October 4, 2006, Kitade released her eighth single,"Kibou no Kakera", which was used as the opening theme song for the anime Demashita! Powerpuff Girls Z. The single peaked at #64 on the Oricon singles chart. On December 6, she released her second studio album, I Scream, which featured a cover of Green Day's "Basket Case". 2007–09: Berry Berry Singles and Bondage On July 3, 2007 the song "Antoinette Blue" began being used as the fourth ending theme for the anime D.Gray-manOn July 7, Kitade performed at fifth annual Japan Expo in Paris, France. "Antoinette Blue" was released as Kitade's single on September 5. On November 14 she released her first compilation album, Berry Berry Singles. Kitade's tenth single, "Suicides Love Story" was released March 5, 2008. The song was used as the ending theme to the Aniplex anime Persona: Trini
